title: Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
